Subscribing to the Calendar feed
Maximise Your Membership Experience
Copy and paste this URL into the 'subscribe' or 'from URL' section of your calendar:
http://bit.ly/FATC-Calendar
IMPORTANT: Don't download the ics file and upload it to your calendar, you must
subscribe to the feed to ensure you always have an up to date and accurate calendar.
